title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Various Senior Resident Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Senior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MD/ MS can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
